summary: REQ-8 is fully implemented. The diff shows frontend/src/index.css was updated to change the .char-current blinking cursor color from cyan (oklch(0.72 0.19 195)) to amber/yellow (oklch(0.85 0.18 75)), including both the class definition and the @keyframes blink animation. The blink animation remains functional, the new color is consistent with the dark navy/cyan theme as an accent, and the correct/incorrect/pending character classes are untouched.
